title: isAuthenticated value not updated after Google login
symptom: After logging in with Google, the 'isAuthenticated' value remains unchanged, preventing access to private pages.
applies_when: User attempts to access private pages
not_this_if: isAuthenticated updates correctly with Xano Auth element
root_cause: The issue arises from a bug in Xano where the dbTable variable needs to be refreshed. Without this refresh, the workflow does not update the 'isAuthenticated' value, leading to access issues for authenticated users.
fix_steps: Open the Xano API workflow settings
Type in dummy text to force a dbTable search
Select the existing table from the dropdown
agent_instruction: Refresh the dbTable variable in the Xano API workflow and republish it.
